Name: NPC_EVENT_PARAM
Description: Defines NPC interaction menus, services, shop data, covenant functions, and related event behavior.

Fields.Name: Shop Menu
Fields.Description: Enables the NPC shop interface.

Fields.Name: Stat Reallocation
Fields.Description: Allows the player to respec or redistribute stat points.

Fields.Name: Equipment Repair Menu
Fields.Description: Enables equipment repair services.

Fields.Name: Equipment Upgrade Menu
Fields.Description: Enables weapon or armor reinforcement.

Fields.Name: Covenant Menu
Fields.Description: Allows the player to join or interact with a covenant.

Fields.Name: Offering Menu
Fields.Description: Allows item offerings or covenant donations.

Fields.Name: Trade-In Menu
Fields.Description: Enables exchanging items for rewards.

Fields.Name: Barter Menu
Fields.Description: Allows item trading or item-for-item exchanges.

Fields.Name: Absolution Menu
Fields.Description: Allows the player to remove sin or hostility penalties.

Fields.Name: Leave Covenant Menu
Fields.Description: Allows the player to abandon a covenant.

Fields.Name: Gesture
Fields.Description: Allows the NPC to teach or grant a gesture.

Fields.Name: Ladder Placement Menu
Fields.Description: Allows interaction for placing or unlocking ladders.

Fields.Name: Route Change Menu
Fields.Description: Enables route or progression branch selection.

Fields.Name: Give Item Menu
Fields.Description: Allows the player to present a required item.

Fields.Name: Covenant List Menu
Fields.Description: Displays covenant information or rankings.

Fields.Name: Contract Type
Fields.Description: Specifies the covenant or contract category.

Fields.Name: Talk Menu
Fields.Description: Enables standard dialogue interaction.

Fields.Name: Estus Flask Reinforcement
Fields.Description: Allows Estus Flask upgrades.

Fields.Name: Level Up
Fields.Description: Allows character level increases.

Fields.Name: Infusion Reinforcement
Fields.Description: Allows elemental or attribute infusion upgrades.

Fields.Name: Give Equipment
Fields.Description: Allows equipment items to be handed over.

Fields.Name: Upgrade Pyromancy Flame
Fields.Description: Allows pyromancy flame reinforcement.

Fields.Name: Required Stat Reduction Menu
Fields.Description: Enables reduction of spell or equipment stat requirements.

Fields.Name: Shop Lineup Start ID
Fields.Description: First entry ID for the NPC shop inventory.

Fields.Name: Shop Lineup End ID
Fields.Description: Last entry ID for the NPC shop inventory.

Fields.Name: Upgrade Type
Fields.Description: Specifies the type of reinforcement service provided.

Fields.Name: Offering Item ID
Fields.Description: Item required for offerings or covenant donations.

Fields.Name: Barter Lineup Start ID
Fields.Description: First barter entry ID.

Fields.Name: Gesture ID
Fields.Description: Gesture granted or referenced by this interaction.

Fields.Name: NPC Character ID
Fields.Description: References the associated NPC character.

Fields.Name: Event Value Change Type
Fields.Description: Specifies how an event value is modified.

Fields.Name: Event Value ID
Fields.Description: References the event variable affected by this interaction.

Fields.Name: Multi-Choice Start ID
Fields.Description: First ID for multi-selection dialogue choices.

Fields.Name: Multi-Choice End ID
Fields.Description: Last ID for multi-selection dialogue choices.

Fields.Name: Barter Lineup End ID
Fields.Description: Last barter entry ID.
